Created attachment 217362
Patch to update devel/mill to 0.8.0

Hi,

an update for devel/mill to version 0.8.0.

Changelog
---------

- fix Scala.JS dependencies versions
- workaround for relative path issues
- use default coursier repos
- revert scalameta version
- fix update documentation

Kind regards,

Jens
